violations.text: Sausage was observed held at 41-51 degrees Fahrenheit over ice. Additional ice was added during time of inspection. Establishment to add adequate ice for cold holding or use mechanical table top cold holding unit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 05/06/2026

Reduced oxygen packaged lobster was observed with the packaging still intact. Lobster was observed at 37 degrees Fahrenheit. Lobster was removed from packaging during time of inspection. Reduced oxygen packaged/ vacuumed packaged fish products must be removed from packaging prior to thawing under refrigeration or by thawing by submerging under cold running water, (you can keep the product in its packaging during thawing) but you must remove it immediately once thawed. The product temperature during thawing should not exceed 41°F. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 05/06/2026
Leak was observed at hot water heater (establishment's hot water not affected). Equipment to be properly adjusted and in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 05/08/2026
Food processor base was observed held by duct tape. Equipment to be in good repair and proper adjustment. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 06/06/2026
The facility is lacking thermo labels or similar internal temperature indicating device for the dish machine in the kitchen. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 05/06/2026
The non-food contact surfaces of the sides of the flattop, fryer and kitchen hoods vents have an accumulation of dust, grease, food residue, and other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 05/13/2026
1 door cooler gaskets were observed in poor repair. New Violation. Correct By: 04/30/2025
The facility is lacking thermo labels or similar internal temperature indicating device for the dish machine in the kitchen. New Violation. Correct By: 04/14/2025
